text: Next Tech Lab AP (NTL) is a Student-led innovation hub and research laboratory located at SRM University-AP, Amaravati, India. A collaborative, non-hierarchical student research lab focused on solving real-world problems using cutting-edge technologies, participating in global competitions, publishing research, and building prototype solutions. Next Tech Lab hosts workshops, paper reading sessions, game jams, hackathons, and project expos to enhance student skills.
The mission of NTL is: To reverse brain-drain and foster deep research culture in India through interdisciplinary student innovation.
NTL's core values include: Student autonomy, Open innovation, Cross-disciplinary research, Practical impact.
NTL operates across campuses: SRM Institute of Science and Technology (Chennai), SRM University-AP (Amaravati).
NTL recognition and awards: Silver Winner — QS Reimagine Education Award (Student-Led Innovation, 2018).
NTL contact information — Address: SRM University, Andhra Pradesh V-203, Neerukonda. Email: nexttechlab@srmap.edu.in. Phone: +91 95733 98234. Website: https://www.nexttechlabap.in.
NTL social links — Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nexttechlab_ap, LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/next-tech-lab-ap/, Arcane: https://pub.nexttechlabap.in/.

Next Tech Lab focuses on the following domains: Artificial Intelligence, Internet of Things (IoT), Computational Biology, Electrical Systems, Extended Reality (XR), Cryptocurrency and Blockchain, Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), Web & App Development, Design (UI/UX).

Next Tech Lab has a Student-led model with a Non-hierarchical hierarchy, involving 8+ departments and 6 research groups. Faculty in charge: no. Approach: Cross-disciplinary, project-based learning and research.
Next Tech Lab was founded in 2016 by Anshuman Pandey and Adithya Ramakrishnan, inspired by MIT Media Lab collaborative research model.
In 2016, Next Tech Lab: Founded after founders spent a semester at MIT.
In 2017, Next Tech Lab: Next Tech Lab established at SRM University-AP Amaravati campus.
In 2018, Next Tech Lab: Won QS Reimagine Education Silver Award for Student-Led Innovation at Wharton School.
Next Tech Lab achievement: Only Indian organization to win QS Reimagine Education Award (2018).
Next Tech Lab achievement: Participation in global events such as Game Developers Conference.
Next Tech Lab achievement: Members showcased work at India HCI Conference and international summits.
Next Tech Lab achievement: Advisors from institutions like MIT, Google Brain, University of Cambridge and Harvard.
Next Tech Lab achievement: Official member of ICXR international XR research network.
Next Tech Lab achievement: Students have excelled at hackathons like ETH Denver (2020) and national hackathons.

Next Tech Lab activities include: 9Hacks hackathons, HackSRM (48-hour student-run national hackathon), Technical workshops (AI/ML, Blockchain, XR), Paper-reading sessions and research discussions, Game jams and design sprints, Next Tech Lab Expos and project showcases, Smart India Hackathon internal qualifiers.
Next Tech Lab has 200+ (LinkedIn reports 201–500 associates) members across 6 research groups.

McCarthy Lab is Next Tech Lab's research group focused on Artificial Intelligence. McCarthy Lab serves as the intellectual hub for artificial intelligence, focusing on the development of novel algorithms across supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning. Research ranges from refining classical statistical models to architecting sophisticated deep learning networks, seeking a rigorous mathematical understanding of why specific computational methods succeed, grounded in both theory and practical experimentation.

McCarthy Lab's guiding quote is by John McCarthy: "Our ultimate objective is to make programs that learn from their experience as effectively as humans do. We shall say that a program has common sense if it automatically deduces for itself a sufficient wide class of immediate consequences of anything it is told and what it already knows."
McCarthy Lab's focus areas include: Machine learning, Deep learning, Natural Language Processing, RAG architectures, Foundation models, Neural networks.

McCarthy Lab roster — Syndicates: Aaryan Regmi, Bhavana Praneeth. Members: Naseer Hussain, Muthu Amudhan S. Associates: Akshat Srivastava, Aadrit, Ayushi Mishra, Konapala Naga Rahul Dhruva, Manya, Ojasv Kushwah, Aadit Bansal, Damineni Hemanth Satya Veer, Sanhik Nandi, Gnanada Alavala, Adarsh Kumar Pandey, Ramratan Padhy, Atmakuri Yeshwanth.

Pausch Lab is Next Tech Lab's research group focused on Immersive Media. Pausch Lab is a hub of immersive media, specializing in AR, VR, extended reality, and 2D and 3D game development. The lab is dedicated to redefining digital interaction by creating highly engaging and spatially aware virtual environments, extending beyond traditional gaming to fully interactive simulations that craft compelling spatial experiences driven by real-time rendering engines.
Pausch Lab's guiding quote is by Randy Pausch: "Experience is what you get when you didn't get what you wanted. And experience is often the most valuable thing you have to offer."
Pausch Lab's focus areas include: Augmented Reality, Virtual Reality, Extended Reality, 2D game development, 3D game development, Real-time rendering, Interactive simulations.

Pausch Lab roster — Syndicates: Daksh Kulkarni, Anjana Modugu. Members: Lakshya Singh, Ayush Kumar, Om Mittal. Associates: Seshagiri Bharadwaj Sai, Aiswarya Patro, Jaideep, Aaditya Raj, Ansh Chaudhary, Satyam Kumar, Abhiram Vattikonda, Rishabh Surana, Ishaan Singh.

Tesla Lab is Next Tech Lab's research group focused on Hardware and Embedded Systems. Its tagline is "WIRE IT, POWER IT". Tesla Lab is a center of hardware innovation, specializing in electronics, embedded systems, and microcontroller architectures. The lab is dedicated to bridging the physical and digital worlds by designing highly efficient and responsive circuitry, extending beyond standard hardware design to complex IoT integrations, engineering robust physical solutions driven by real-time operating systems and edge computing.
Tesla Lab's guiding quote is by Nikola Tesla: "Be alone, that is the secret of invention; be alone, that is when ideas are born."
Tesla Lab's focus areas include: Electronics, Embedded systems, Microcontroller architectures, IoT integrations, Edge computing, Real-time operating systems.

Tesla Lab roster — Syndicates: Rajat Kumar Singh. Members: Parnavo Pal, Burra Krishna Karthikeya. Associates: Prince Kumar Yadav, Venkata Abhiram Jammula, Aayush Bansal, Shazia Mohommed, Kanak Suresh Alone, Paarth Singhal.

Satoshi Lab is Next Tech Lab's research group focused on Blockchain and Cybersecurity. Its tagline is "HACK FIRST, TRUST NONE". Satoshi Lab stands at the forefront of Web3 and digital security, focusing on decentralized architectures and modern defense mechanisms. Research encompasses cryptocurrency, malware analysis, and network security, with a specialized emphasis on penetration testing and reverse engineering. By integrating threat research with advanced cryptography and secure coding, the lab empowers members to engineer resilient, trustless systems.
Satoshi Lab's guiding quote is by Satoshi Nakamoto: "If you don't believe me or don't get it, I don't have time to try to convince you, sorry."
Satoshi Lab's focus areas include: Blockchain protocols, Cryptography, Zero-knowledge proofs, Decentralized monitoring, Cybersecurity systems, Malware analysis, Vulnerability assessment.

Notable projects from Satoshi Lab: Poseidon (zk-SNARK cryptography toolkit): Privacy-preserving blockchain proof system; dPIN (Decentralized monitoring system): Distributed and trustless infrastructure monitoring network.

Satoshi Lab roster — Syndicates: Ayush Dutta. Members: Rohan Kumar Mohanta, Shivangi Sharma, Rahul Rajith, Jayesh Krishna, Shruthi Bhagawan. Associates: Satwik Gupta, Hardik Chaurasia, P. Bharath Varma, Kartikey Juyal, Lakshaya Sharma, Aakriti Gupta, S.MD. Arshadullah.

Norman Lab is Next Tech Lab's research group focused on Web, App and Cloud. Its tagline is "BUILD BOLD, MADE HUMAN". Norman Lab is a center of innovation, specializing in web development, app development, cloud computing, and UI/UX design. The lab is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of online experiences by creating seamless and user-friendly interfaces, extending beyond typical web apps into app development with creative, cutting-edge solutions.

Norman Lab's guiding quote is by Don Norman: "A product is more than its features. It is an experience — an experience shaped by expectations, context, culture, and emotion. Designers must understand people before they try to design for them."
Norman Lab's focus areas include: Web development, App development, Cloud computing, UI/UX design, User interfaces, Digital experiences.

Norman Lab roster — Syndicates: Shatadru Mukhopadhyay, Asrith Tanniru. Members: Vissamsetty Lakshmi Nikitha, Anurag Tummapudi. Associates: Ghule Aniketh, Arun Kumar Yarlagadda, Yuvraj Singh, Cherukuri Shanyu Sai, Rohit Chintalapudi, Manoj Inturi, Aditya Chandra, Alok Raj, Ravuri Uma Manvitha, J Omkareswar, Talari Roshini, Saikanth Gubbala, G Sri Krishna Abhiram.
